CustomField.description: Displays the RAG colour of the calculated impact by likelihood as per the scoring matrix
CustomField.formula:
IF( OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Very High"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Unlikely")), AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Very High"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Unlikely")) ), "AMBER",
IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Very High"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Possible"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Likely"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Likely") ) ), "RED",
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "High"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Unlikely")), "GREEN",
IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "High"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Unlikely"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Possible") ) ), "AMBER",
IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "High"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Likely"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Likely") ) ), "RED",
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Medium"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Unlikely")), "GREEN",
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Medium"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Unlikely")), "GREEN",
IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Medium"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Possible"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Likely"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Likely") ) ), "AMBER",
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Low"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Unlikely")), "GREEN",
IF( AND(ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Low"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Unlikely")), "GREEN",
IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Low"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Possible"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Likely"), ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Very Likely") ) ), "GREEN",
IF( ISPICKVAL(Likelihood__c, "Certain"), "RED",
IF( ISPICKVAL(Impact__c, "Very Low"), "GREEN",
"No Color" )))))))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the RAG colour of the calculated impact by likelihood as per the scoring matrix
CustomField.label: Risk
